channel.title: FaaS on Aman Goyal
channel.description: Recent content in FaaS on Aman Goyal

item.title: Functions and Event-Driven Processing: Going Serverless
item.description: Core Concept FaaS (Functions-as-a-Service) = event-driven, short-lived compute Functions: Run on-demand Are stateless Triggered by events or requests Often called serverless (but not exactly the same) When to Use FaaS Best for: Event-driven tasks Short-lived processing Low/variable traffic Examples: Sending emails Notifications API transformations Benefits 1. Extremely simple deployment Just write code → no infra management Faster time to production 2. Auto-scaling Automatically scales with traffic Handles failures automatically 3. Strong decoupling Each function is independent Encourages modular systems 4.
